test_files.description: Tests for recording skipped scheduled executions when max_instances=1 reached
Tests for dynamic thinking status labels: status mapping logic, async mode, SSE streaming, session persistence
Tests for Nevermined config read/write permission split: owner CRUD, unauthenticated rejection, nonexistent agent handling
Tests for Operator Queue API: list/get/respond/cancel items, stats, auth requirements, agent-specific queries, input validation
Tests for scheduler async fire-and-forget dispatch with DB polling: async dispatch, polling, status overwrite guard, backward compatibility, timeout handling
Tests for cleanup service Issue #106 fixes: no-session execution fast-fail, orphaned skipped execution finalization, cleanup report structure
Tests for per-user persistent memory for public link agents: DB operations (get_or_create, increment, update), system prompt formatting, anonymous session isolation
Tests for base image allowlist validation: default allowlist, custom settings, malformed settings fallback, error messages (19 tests)
Tests for OTP verification rate limiting: per-email attempt counter, IP rate limit, brute-force lockout after 5 failures, counter reset on success

Tests for broken access control fix: admin-only endpoints (ops, observability, system-agent, alerts), owner-only agent endpoints (credentials, chat history, queue, skills), agent access checks (stats, queue, skills, detail, logs)
Tests for credential injection file path allowlist: allowed paths (.env, .mcp.json, etc.), blocked paths (arbitrary HTML, path traversal, CLAUDE.md overwrite), mixed paths, edge cases (20 tests)
